issue_title: Nuqs not parsing on pasting the url
issue_body_preview:
<!-- Please read and follow the issue template. Issues submitted without a reproduction and context will take longer to resolve. -->

## Context

What's your version of `nuqs`?

```
"nuqs": "^1.17.6",
```

Next.js information (obtained by running `next info`):

```
Operating System:
test_description_zh: 在浏览器地址栏中直接粘贴一个包含查询参数的完整URL（例如 /?foo=bar&count=42）并回车导航，观察页面中由 nuqs 解析的查询参数状态是否正确显示。
expected_result_zh: 粘贴包含查询参数的URL并导航后，页面应正确解析URL中的所有查询参数，并将对应的状态值正确渲染到页面上，与通过页面内交互设置相同参数时的表现一致。
